summary_en: Dividend per share: 5.00 yen → 5.20 yen (FY3/26 end). Policy change to progressive annual increases of ~20 yen/share target. Total dividend 88M yen. Effective FY3/26 period end (record date 2026-03-31). ROE 11.4% achieved in FY3/26, targeting sustained improvement.
title_en: Notice of Dividend Policy Change (Introduction of Progressive Dividend) and Dividend Payment
translation_en_brief: Terilogy Holdings announced a change to its dividend policy on 21 May 2026, effective from the fiscal year ending March 2026. The company will adopt a progressive dividend approach, targeting annual increases of approximately 20 yen per share. For FY3/26, the dividend per share increases from 5.00 yen to 5.20 yen, with a total dividend payment of 88 million yen (record date 31 March 2026, payment date 24 June 2026). The new policy reflects management's commitment to shareholder returns while maintaining financial stability and cost-of-capital awareness. The company achieved ROE of 11.4% in FY3/26 against a target of 10.0%, and intends to continue improving capital efficiency and enterprise value.
